name: achievement
description: Manually edit a player's achievements (Owner Only)
details: None

options.name: edit
options.description: Open the achievement editor for a player

name: announce
description: Create a beautiful announcement in any channel
details: Sends a styled announcement embed to any channel you choose.

options.name: channel
options.description: The channel to send the announcement to

name: disable
description: Disable a command category in a channel or server-wide
details: Disables a command category in a specific channel or server-wide.

options.name: all
options.description: Disable this category in the whole server

name: enable
description: Enable a command category in a channel or server-wide
details: Re-enables a previously disabled command category.

name: setai
description: Sets the smart AI channel for the server
details: None

options.name: channel
options.description: The channel where Jack AI will respond automatically

name: setfoster
description: Set the Foster Program channel
details: None

name: setlog
description: Set the moderation log channel
details: Sets the channel where moderation actions are logged.

name: setup
description: Setup the permanent admin guide dashboard
details: Posts the permanent staff command dashboard in the current channel. Refreshes automatically if already set.

options.name: admin-guide
options.description: Create or refresh the staff admin command dashboard

name: regstatus
description: Audit clan member registration status
details: Audit clan member registration status

name: card
description: Card database management commands
details: None

options.name: sync
options.description: Sync the card database from Discord threads

name: hud
description: Access your Celestial HUD (Live Status)
details: Opens a real-time tactical dashboard showing your energy, level progress, and foster status.

name: clanroster
description: View the full clan player roster
details: Shows the full registered clan member list with IGN, UID, and synergy.

name: deleteplayer
description: Delete a player's clan profile
details: Permanently removes a player's clan profile from the database.

name: editprofile
description: Edit your BGMI player profile
details: Edit your own BGMI player profile (IGN, UID, level, mode preferences).

name: ign
description: View a player's in-game name
details: Displays the in-game name of a registered BGMI player.

name: ignall
description: View a list of all player IGNs in the database (Admin Only)
details: Displays a paginated list of all player IGNs from the database.

name: profile
description: Show BGMI player profile
details: Shows a player's full BGMI profile card including IGN, UID, synergy, and level. Click 'View Achievements' for stats.

name: profilecreate
description: Create an unlinked BGMI player profile (Admin Only)
details: Opens the registration modal to create an unlinked profile for a player without a Discord account.

name: profiletransfer
description: Link an unlinked profile to a Discord user (Admin Only)
details: Allows admins to transfer an unlinked, manually-created profile to a Discord user. If an unlinked profile matches perfectly when a user runs /register, it is claimed automatically.

options.name: user
options.description: The target Discord user to link the profile to

name: register
description: Register your BGMI player profile
details: Registers your BGMI player profile (IGN, UID, level, preferred modes).

name: uid
description: View a player's BGMI UID
details: Shows the BGMI UID of a registered clan player.

name: unlinked
description: View all unlinked player profiles (Admin Only)
details: Displays a paginated list of all manually created profiles that have not yet been linked to a Discord user.

name: bp
description: Submit your daily battle contribution points
details: Submit your daily battle points (1-100). Only once per day during an active clan battle.

name: editbp
description: Edit a player's today battle points
details: Admin command to overwrite a player's daily contribution points. Adjusts total accordingly.

options.name: user
options.description: Discord user to edit (provide either user or uid)

options.name: uid
options.description: Target player by UID (if not on Discord)

name: edittotalbp
description: Edit a player's total battle points
details: Admin command to directly set a player's total contribution points.

options.name: user
options.description: Discord user to edit (provide either user or uid)

options.name: uid
options.description: Target player by UID (if not on Discord)

name: emojiadd
description: Summon a specific emoji from the Global Vault to your server.
details: Summons a specific emoji from the Global Vault into your server.

options.name: emojiname
options.description: Name of the emoji to download

name: emojibank
description: View the Global Emoji Bank list.
details: Shows a text list of all emojis stored in the Global Vault.

name: emojibrowse
description: Browse the visual interface of the Global Emoji Vault.
details: Opens a visual paginated browser for the Global Emoji Vault.

name: emojicleanup
description: Scans for server emojis unused in the CDN for 30+ days.
details: Scans for server emojis unused in the CDN for 30+ days to free up slots.

name: emojiremove
description: Remove an emoji from the global vault.
details: Removes a specific emoji from the Global Vault permanently.

options.name: emojiname
options.description: Name of the emoji to delete

name: emoji
description: Summon an emoji from the global CDN directly into chat.
details: Summons any emoji from the Global CDN directly into chat as a large image.

name: emojislots
description: Check the current server emoji and sticker slot usage.
details: Shows current emoji and sticker slot usage for the server.

name: emojitemp
description: Temporarily install a global emoji for 10 minutes to save slots.
details: Temporarily installs a global emoji for 10 minutes to save permanent slots.

options.name: name
options.description: Exact name of the vault emoji

name: fs-pairremove
description: Remove a pair from the active Foster Program
details: None

name: fs-replace
description: Replace a mentor or newbie in an active Foster Program pair
details: None

options.name: role
options.description: Which role to replace: mentor or newbie

name: fs-start
description: Start the Foster Program v2 (Staff Only)
details: None

name: action
description: Perform a fun action (hug, slap, kiss, etc.)
details: Performs a fun animated action: hug, slap, kiss, poke, pat, and more.

name: tictactoe
description: Challenge another user to a game of TicTacToe
details: Starts a TicTacToe match. If a user is specified, it challenges them. If not, you play against an intelligent AI.

name: tttlb
description: View the TicTacToe leaderboard
details: Shows the top 10 TicTacToe players based on wins.

name: setupgreeting
description: Configure channels for welcome and goodbye messages.
details: Use this to manage the channels for the greeting plugin.

name: addxp
description: Add XP to a user
details: Admin: Adds XP directly to a user's level progress.

name: removexp
description: Remove XP from a user
details: Admin: Removes XP from a user's level progress.

name: xpresetweekly
description: Reset weekly XP for EVERYONE in the server
details: Admin: Resets weekly XP for every member in the server.

name: resetxp
description: Reset all XP for a user
details: Admin: Fully resets all XP for a specific user.

name: resetxpall
description: Reset ALL XP for EVERYONE in the server
details: Admin: Wipes XP for ALL members server-wide. Irreversible.

name: setlevel
description: Set Level for a user
details: Admin: Forces a user to a specific level directly.

name: setxp
description: Set XP for a user
details: Admin: Sets a user's total XP to an exact amount.

name: leaderboard
description: View the server XP leaderboard
details: Shows the top XP leaderboard for the server, sorted by level and XP.

name: rank
description: Show your or another user's rank card
details: Displays your (or another user's) rank card with level, XP bar, and server position.

name: rankbackground
description: Set your custom rank card background
details: Set a custom background image for your personal rank card.

options.name: set
options.description: Set a custom background image via URL

name: cancelpop
description: Cancel your active POP market listing
details: Cancels your active POP listing from the marketplace.

options.name: listing_id
options.description: The ID of the listing (Admins only)

name: popmarket
description: Force refresh the POP marketplace panel
details: Force-refreshes the POP marketplace panel in the designated channel.

name: sell
description: List your POP for sale on the marketplace
details: Lists your POP for sale on the server marketplace.

name: addrole
description: Add a role to a user
details: Assigns a role to a member.

name: ban
description: Ban a member from the server
details: Permanently bans a member from the server with an optional reason.

name: clear
description: Delete multiple messages from a channel
details: Bulk-deletes up to 1000 messages in the current channel. Can also filter by user.

name: clearall
description: Delete all messages in the channel (Nuke)
details: Deletes ALL messages in the channel by cloning the channel and deleting the original. Bypasses the 14-day limit.

name: clearwarns
description: Clear all warnings from a user
details: Clears all warnings from a user's record.

name: kick
description: Kick a member from the server
details: Kicks a member from the server.

name: lock
description: Lock the current channel
details: Locks the current channel so members cannot send messages.

name: mute
description: Timeout a member for a specified duration
details: Times out a member for a specified duration (e.g. 10m, 1h, 1d).

name: nickname
description: Change a user's nickname
details: Changes a member's displayed server nickname.

options.name: user
options.description: User whose nickname will be changed

name: removerole
description: Remove a role from a user
details: Removes a role from a member.

name: unban
description: Unban a user from the server
details: Unbans a user by their Discord ID.

name: unlock
description: Unlock the current channel
details: Unlocks a previously locked channel so members can speak again.

name: unmute
description: Remove timeout from a member
details: Removes a timeout from a member early.

name: unwarn
description: Remove a warning from a user
details: Removes a specific warning from a user's record by warn ID.

name: warn
description: Warn a user with a reason
details: Issues a formal warning to a member and stores it in the database.

name: warnings
description: View warnings for a user
details: Shows all recorded warnings for a member.

name: packadd
description: Add an existing global emoji to an Emoji Pack
details: Adds an existing Global Vault emoji to an emoji pack.

name: packcreate
description: Create an empty Emoji Pack in the Global Vault
details: Creates a new empty Emoji Pack in the Global Vault.

name: packimport
description: Download a full Global Emoji Pack into your server automatically.
details: Downloads a full emoji pack into your server, filling available emoji slots.

options.name: packname
options.description: Exact name of the pack to download

name: packremove
description: Remove an emoji from its Emoji Pack
details: Removes an emoji from an emoji pack.

name: prefix
description: Manage the bot's custom prefix for this server.
usage: /prefix set <new_prefix> | j prefix remove | j prefix review
details: None

name: record
description: Manage voice recordings
details: Start or stop multi-track voice recordings in your current voice channel.

options.name: start
options.description: Start recording the current voice channel

options.name: stop
options.description: Stop the current recording and get the files

name: rradd
description: Add a Role option to a Reaction Role Panel
details: Adds a new role option button to an existing Reaction Role Panel.

name: rrcreate
description: Create a new Reaction Role Custom Panel
details: Creates a new custom Reaction Role panel with buttons in the channel.

options.name: channel
options.description: Channel to send the panel to

name: rrdelete
description: Delete an active Reaction Role Panel permanently
details: Permanently deletes an existing Reaction Role Panel.

name: rrremove
description: Remove a Role option from a Reaction Role Panel
details: Removes a specific role button from a Reaction Role Panel.

name: sayit
description: Resends a replied-to message through the bot and deletes the original.
details: None

name: se
description: Set season energy for a user (Admin)
details: Admin command to directly set a user's season energy.

options.name: user
options.description: Discord target user (provide either user or uid)

options.name: uid
options.description: Target player by UID (if not on Discord)

name: synergy-setup
description: Deploy the Synergy Automation Panel to the moderation channel
details: None

name: we
description: Submit your weekly energy points
details: Submit weekly energy (1-15000). Weekend only. Admins can submit on behalf of a user and bypass restrictions.

options.name: user
options.description: (Admin) Target user to submit energy for

name: setup-control-panel
description: Initializes the admin control panel in the designated channel.
details: None

name: setup-overview
description: Initializes the server overview in the designated channel.
details: None

name: stickeradd
description: Summon a specific sticker from the Global Vault to your server.
details: Copies a sticker from the Global Vault into your server.

options.name: stickername
options.description: Exact name of the sticker to download

name: stickerbank
description: View the Global Sticker Bank list.
details: Shows a text list of all stickers in the Global Vault.

name: stickerbrowse
description: Browse the visual interface of the Global Sticker Vault.
details: Opens a visual paginated browser for the Global Sticker Vault.

name: stickerremove
description: Remove a sticker from the global vault.
details: Removes a sticker from the Global Vault permanently.

options.name: stickername
options.description: Name of the sticker to delete

name: sticker
description: Summon a sticker from the global CDN directly into chat (Bypasses server slots).
details: Sends a sticker from the Global CDN directly into chat (bypasses server sticker slots).

name: createteam
description: Create a new team for gaming or esports.
details: None

name: deleteteam
description: Disband and delete your current team.
details: None

name: leaveteam
description: Leave your current team.
details: None

name: ticketpanel
description: Create the advanced ticket panel with category selection
details: None

name: afk
description: Set yourself as AFK
details: Marks you as AFK. Bot will mention others when they ping you.

name: avatar
description: Show a user's avatar
details: Displays the full-size avatar of yourself or another user.

name: help
description: View the interactive help menu with all available commands.
details: Displays a fully dynamic UI-based help system separating user and admin commands.

name: memberlist
description: List all server members with their roles
details: Shows all server members with username, display name, nickname, user ID, and assigned roles — paginated.

options.name: role
options.description: Filter members by a specific role (mention or name)

name: ping
description: Check bot latency
details: Shows the bot's current latency to the Discord API.

name: poll
description: Create a Yes/No poll
details: Creates a Yes/No poll embed with reaction buttons.

name: prefixtest
description: Test prefix system
details: Tests that the prefix system is working correctly.

name: serverinfo
description: Show information about the server
details: Shows detailed info about the server: owner, member count, channels, boosts, etc.

name: steal
description: Steal an emoji or sticker by replying to a message and store it globally.
usage: j steal (reply to a message with emoji/sticker)
details: Steals an emoji or sticker from a replied message and stores it in the Global Vault.

name: userinfo
description: Get information about a user
details: Shows detailed info about a user: roles, join date, creation date, etc.
